fields.economic_effect: Instrument universe for MV2 offline research wiring.
fields.rationale: STEP 29L binds MV2 research wiring to a single canonical futures instrument.
fields.safety_effect: Blocks BTC/XBT/spot instrument leakage into canonical economic path.

fields.economic_effect: Contract type must be linear USDT-margined futures semantics.
fields.rationale: Admissible dataset descriptor requires explicit futures contract typing.
fields.safety_effect: Rejects spot contract typing.

fields.economic_effect: Economic evaluation scope is futures-only.
fields.rationale: Runbook safety invariant for STEP 29M economic evaluation.
fields.safety_effect: Fail-closed on non-futures data classes.

fields.economic_effect: Bitcoin-direction strategies are out of scope.
fields.rationale: Runbook safety invariant forbids BTC/XBT direction in canonical path.
fields.safety_effect: Fail-closed on BTC/XBT instrument and direction leakage.

fields.economic_effect: Dataset schema version gates required bar columns and digest semantics.
fields.rationale: Admissible versioned futures dataset binding is version-locked.
fields.safety_effect: Unknown schema versions fail closed.

fields.economic_effect: Dataset identity and manifest contract version.
fields.rationale: Runner rejects unknown dataset versions.
fields.safety_effect: Prevents unversioned dataset identity drift.

fields.economic_effect: Manifest digest and provenance envelope version.
fields.rationale: Runner validates manifest_version against canonical contract.
fields.safety_effect: Unknown manifest versions fail closed.

fields.economic_effect: Primary bar series for offline economic evidence generation.
fields.rationale: No real admissible futures dataset is bound in-repo; operator must stage curated export.
fields.safety_effect: Blocks evaluation on missing or remote paths.

fields.economic_effect: Binds dataset identity, splits, and provenance digests.
fields.rationale: Digest-verified manifest is mandatory for admissibility and reproducibility.
fields.safety_effect: Missing or mismatched manifest digest fails closed.

fields.economic_effect: Classifies dataset provenance for admissibility gating.
fields.rationale: Runner rejects fixture, preview, probe, transport, and spot source types.
fields.safety_effect: Prevents fixture and venue-transport leakage into canonical economic path.

fields.economic_effect: Traceable operator-curated export reference outside repo fixtures.
fields.rationale: Provenance must identify operator-staged real export, not in-repo test fixtures.
fields.safety_effect: Blocks fixture and venue-specific canonicalization paths.

fields.economic_effect: Venue identity for provenance only; not canonical venue logic.
fields.rationale: Venue id is recorded for traceability but must not drive venue-specific canonicalization.
fields.safety_effect: Venue-specific canonical economic paths are forbidden.

fields.economic_effect: Documents how the staged dataset was produced.
fields.rationale: Generation method must not classify as synthetic or test fixture generation.
fields.safety_effect: Rejects synthetic/test generation markers.

fields.economic_effect: Ingestion timestamp for provenance audit trail.
fields.rationale: Required provenance field for admissible dataset binding.
fields.safety_effect: Missing provenance fails closed.

fields.economic_effect: Full data coverage window for economic evidence.
fields.rationale: Derived from staged bars once dataset exists; currently no bound real dataset.
fields.safety_effect: Cannot assert coverage without staged real dataset.

fields.economic_effect: Training split for walk-forward and leakage checks.
fields.rationale: Computed by split policy once real bars are staged and admissible.
fields.safety_effect: Temporal leakage checks require real split boundaries.

fields.economic_effect: Validation split for robustness evidence.
fields.rationale: Computed by split policy once real bars are staged.
fields.safety_effect: Leakage checks require real split boundaries.

fields.economic_effect: Out-of-sample split for economic validity gate.
fields.rationale: Computed by split policy once real bars are staged.
fields.safety_effect: OOS evidence requires real split boundaries.

fields.economic_effect: Bar granularity drives funding interval alignment and replay cadence.
fields.rationale: Schema requires bar_interval column; exact value comes from staged dataset.
fields.safety_effect: Mismatched granularity breaks funding and replay alignment.

fields.economic_effect: Versioned cost binding envelope for fee, slippage, execution.
fields.rationale: Runner requires explicit versioned cost model binding.
fields.safety_effect: Missing cost model version fails closed.

fields.economic_effect: Fee model version recorded in economic evidence.
fields.rationale: Canonical fee model version from cost config owner.
fields.safety_effect: Unversioned fee model blocks economic claims.

fields.economic_effect: Slippage model version recorded in economic evidence.
fields.rationale: Canonical slippage model version from cost config owner.
fields.safety_effect: Unversioned slippage model blocks economic claims.

fields.economic_effect: Explicit non-zero fee assumption for realistic economic evaluation.
fields.rationale: Runner rejects missing or zero fee_bps; operator must supply realistic fee.
fields.safety_effect: Implicit zero-cost evaluation is forbidden.

fields.economic_effect: Explicit non-zero slippage assumption for realistic economic evaluation.
fields.rationale: Runner rejects missing or zero slippage_bps; operator must supply realistic slippage.
fields.safety_effect: Implicit zero-cost evaluation is forbidden.

fields.economic_effect: Funding drag model version and interval-aligned payments.
fields.rationale: Funding binding is canonical once bind=true in evaluation config.
fields.safety_effect: Missing funding binding fails closed.

fields.economic_effect: Offline execution model version in economic evidence.
fields.rationale: Canonical execution model from cost config owner.
fields.safety_effect: Unversioned execution model blocks economic claims.

fields.economic_effect: Versioned economic validity gate thresholds and reason codes.
fields.rationale: Canonical policy with configured thresholds is bound in STEP 29M.
fields.safety_effect: Unconfigured thresholds block economic validity claims.

fields.economic_effect: Strategy identity for MV2 offline research replay chain.
fields.rationale: Runner defaults to ma_crossover; operator may override within MV2 wiring compatibility.
fields.safety_effect: Unsupported strategy/instrument pair fails closed in MV2 wiring.

fields.economic_effect: Parameter sensitivity grid for robustness evidence.
fields.rationale: Operator must supply realistic fee/slippage sensitivity grid in evaluation config.
fields.safety_effect: Missing sensitivity binding blocks evaluation.

fields.economic_effect: Walk-forward window sizing for OOS stability evidence.
fields.rationale: Operator chooses window sizes appropriate to staged dataset length.
fields.safety_effect: Missing walk-forward binding blocks evaluation.

fields.economic_effect: Monte Carlo robustness sample count and deterministic seed.
fields.rationale: Operator configures MC runs/seed for staged dataset economics.
fields.safety_effect: Missing MC binding blocks evaluation.

fields.economic_effect: Stress suite binding for tail-risk evidence.
fields.rationale: Stress bind=true is required; scenario set is canonical in policy.
fields.safety_effect: Missing stress binding blocks evaluation.

fields.economic_effect: Versioned evaluation config binding all cost, funding, sensitivity, and splits.
fields.rationale: Runner requires explicit config_path with all bindings.
fields.safety_effect: Missing config blocks evaluation.

fields.economic_effect: Economic validity policy overlay or canonical use_canonical=true.
fields.rationale: Canonical policy overlay is deterministically resolvable without operator file.
fields.safety_effect: Policy version mismatch fails closed.

fields.economic_effect: Durable evidence output location with manifest verification.
fields.rationale: Real evaluation evidence must be persisted under operator durable archive root.
fields.safety_effect: Tmp-only evidence is invalid for economic admissibility closure.

fields.economic_effect: Dataset content digest for reproducibility and admissibility binding.
fields.rationale: Computed once real staged bars exist; currently no bound real dataset.
fields.safety_effect: Digest mismatch fails closed.

fields.economic_effect: Manifest digest for evidence bundle integrity.
fields.rationale: Computed once operator manifest is staged.
fields.safety_effect: Manifest digest mismatch fails closed.

fields.economic_effect: Config digest binds cost, funding, sensitivity, and evaluation parameters.
fields.rationale: Computed once operator evaluation config is staged.
fields.safety_effect: Config digest mismatch fails closed.

fields.economic_effect: Minimum trade count threshold from canonical economic validity policy.
fields.rationale: Threshold is canonically bound; realized trade count requires real evaluation.
fields.safety_effect: Low trade-count regimes fail economic validity gate.

fields.economic_effect: Dataset profile governs L1 requirements and execution cost binding semantics.
fields.rationale: Explicit dataset profile is mandatory; missing profile fails closed.
fields.safety_effect: Implicit profile selection is forbidden.

fields.economic_effect: Declares whether L1 prices are observed in dataset or model-bound for research.
fields.rationale: Profile-specific L1 observation status must be explicit in manifest and staging inputs.
fields.safety_effect: Prevents silent substitution of modelled spread for observed L1.

fields.economic_effect: Conservative spread model version for economic research profile.
fields.rationale: Research profile requires explicit spread model binding when L1 is not observed.
fields.safety_effect: Missing spread model blocks research profile evaluation.

fields.economic_effect: Declares execution price observation source for research spread binding.
fields.rationale: Research profile must not claim observed L1 when using model-bound spread.
fields.safety_effect: Prevents mislabelled observed execution prices in research evidence.

fields.economic_effect: Canonical economic validity thresholds; evaluation applies after real run only.
fields.rationale: Threshold values are version-bound; pass/fail requires real evaluation output.
fields.safety_effect: Threshold tuning without versioned policy change is forbidden.
